incidents.detail: Balbuena pulls down Jamal Musiala from behind in midfield, earning an early caution as Germany dominates possession.
Kimmich receives a yellow for a tactical foul stopping a dangerous Paraguay counterattack on the right flank.
Wirtz pounces on a rebound after Musiala's shot is blocked, finishing with a left-footed drive from 12 yards into the far corner.
Alderete is cautioned for a heavy challenge on Maximilian Mittelstädt as Paraguay struggles to contain Germany's width.
Almirón cuts inside from the right wing past David Raum and curls a precise low shot into the bottom corner, leaving Neuer with no chance.
Villasanti receives a caution for obstructing Wirtz as Germany intensifies their push for a winner.
Rüdiger is booked for a late, heavy challenge on Andrés Cubas as tempers rise in the closing stages.
